skill.name: humanizer
skill.description: Edit AI-generated or polished text so it reads more natural, specific, and human. The skill identifies common AI writing patterns and rewrites text while preserving meaning and tone.
skill.summary: Rewrite AI-sounding text into clearer, more natural prose.
skill.author: softaworks

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported command execution, network, filesystem, weak-crypto, and reconnaissance indicators. Manual review found these are documentation snippets, Markdown examples, external references, and prose examples rather than executable code or malicious instructions. No prompt injection, credential access, data exfiltration, or runtime command behavior was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Documentation Shell Examples
low_findings.description: Static command findings in README.md are install commands and usage examples, not skill runtime instructions. They do not execute automatically and do not process user-controlled input.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines are fenced Markdown examples or inline text. I did not find code that invokes a shell during skill execution.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Documentation URLs
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URL findings are repository credits, installation targets, and Wikipedia references. No evidence found that the skill sends data to these URLs.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs appear in documentation and citations only. There are no fetch, curl, webhook, or upload instructions tied to user content.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Hidden Home Directory Install Paths
low_findings.description: The hidden path findings refer to Claude Code skill installation paths under ~/.claude. They are not instructions to read secrets or modify unrelated user files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The paths are used only for installation examples. The reviewed skill instructions focus on editing supplied text.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak-Crypto and Reconnaissance Keywords
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography and reconnaissance matches occur in prose, examples, and quoted writing guidance. No evidence found of cryptographic operations, host enumeration, or system information collection.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The lines are natural-language examples about writing style. I did not find API calls, commands, or logic related to cryptography or reconnaissance.

content.value_statement: AI-generated drafts often sound vague, inflated, or formulaic. This skill rewrites them into clearer prose with specific details and natural rhythm.
actual_capabilities: Identifies common AI writing patterns in supplied text.
Rewrites vague or promotional phrasing into direct prose.
Removes chatbot artifacts, generic conclusions, and excessive hedging.
Preserves the main meaning while changing style and rhythm.
Summarizes key edits when that helps the user review changes.
limitations: It cannot verify factual claims without separate source checking.
It may need user guidance for brand voice or sensitive tone.
It does not guarantee text will bypass AI detection tools.
It is designed for prose, not source code or structured data.

use_cases.title: Revise marketing copy
use_cases.description: Turn promotional draft text into direct copy with fewer inflated claims.

use_cases.title: Clean documentation prose
use_cases.description: Remove formulaic AI phrasing from guides, release notes, and help content.

use_cases.title: Polish professional messages
use_cases.description: Make emails, briefs, and proposals sound clear without sounding automated.

prompt_templates.title: Basic rewrite
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner edit for a short draft.
prompt_templates.prompt: Humanize this text. Keep the meaning, remove AI-sounding phrases, and make it concise: [paste text]

prompt_templates.title: Tone-matched revision
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate edit with audience and voice guidance.
prompt_templates.prompt: Humanize this for [audience]. Match a [tone] voice and keep all important facts: [paste text]

prompt_templates.title: Pattern audit and rewrite
prompt_templates.prompt: Find AI writing patterns in this draft, rewrite the text, and list the main changes: [paste text]

prompt_templates.title: Publication polish
prompt_templates.prompt: Rewrite this for publication. Preserve facts, remove generic claims, vary sentence structure, and flag anything that needs sourcing: [paste text]

output_examples.input: Our product represents a pivotal step forward in the evolving landscape of team productivity.
output_examples.output: Our product helps teams assign work, track deadlines, and see blockers in one place.

output_examples.input: Despite these challenges, the company continues to thrive and shape the future of the industry.
output_examples.output: Revenue grew 12 percent last quarter, but hiring slowed after two large customers delayed renewals.

output_examples.input: I hope this helps! Let me know if you would like me to expand on any section.
output_examples.output: The draft ends after the final recommendation.

best_practices: Provide the intended audience and tone before asking for a rewrite.
Ask the skill to preserve facts, names, numbers, and required terms.
Review the final text for factual accuracy and source support.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to hide plagiarism or misrepresent authorship.
Do not ask it to invent facts to make text sound specific.
Do not rely on it as a factual verification tool.

faq.question: Does this skill detect AI-generated text?
faq.answer: It identifies common AI writing patterns. It does not provide a forensic AI-detection score.

faq.question: Can it keep my original meaning?
faq.answer: Yes. Its instructions prioritize preserving meaning while changing style, tone, and sentence structure.

faq.question: Can it edit long documents?
faq.answer: Yes, but long documents work best in sections with clear audience and tone guidance.

faq.question: Does it check facts?
faq.answer: No. It may flag vague claims, but source checking needs a separate research step.

faq.question: Can I use it in Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Will it make text undetectable by AI detectors?
faq.answer: No. It improves naturalness and clarity, but it does not guarantee detector results.
